service.description: Get distinct assembly products (parent products with BOM items) for the current company. Returns one entry per assembly product.

iterate.script: boms.add([ productId: bom.productId, productPseudoId: bom.productPseudoId, productName: bom.productName ])

service.description: Get BOM items (ProductAssoc with PatMfgBom type) for the current company. Optionally filter by parent productId.

iterate.script: bomItems.add([ productId: bom.productId, productPseudoId: bom.productPseudoId, productName: bom.productName, toProductId: bom.toProductId, componentPseudoId: bom.componentPseudoId, componentName: bom.componentName, productAssocTypeEnumId: bom.productAssocTypeEnumId, fromDate: bom.fromDate?.toString(), quantity: bom.quantity?.toString(), scrapFactor: bom.scrapFactor?.toString(), sequenceNum: bom.sequenceNum, availableQuantity: totalAvailable?.toString() ])

service.description: Create a BOM item (ProductAssoc with PatMfgBom type).

return.message: Assembly product '${bomItem.productId}' not found for company
Component product '${bomItem.toProductId}' not found for company

service-call.name: create#mantle.product.ProductAssoc
service-call.in-map: [productId: resolvedParentId, toProductId: resolvedCompId, productAssocTypeEnumId: bomItem.productAssocTypeEnumId ?: 'PatMfgBom', fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, quantity: bomItem.quantity ?: 1.0, scrapFactor: bomItem.scrapFactor, sequenceNum: bomItem.sequenceNum]

service.description: Update a BOM item quantity/scrapFactor by expiring the old record and creating a new one (ProductAssoc uses fromDate as PK).

service-call.name: update#mantle.product.ProductAssoc
service-call.in-map: [productId: bomItem.productId, toProductId: bomItem.toProductId, productAssocTypeEnumId: bomItem.productAssocTypeEnumId ?: 'PatMfgBom', fromDate: bomItem.fromDate, quantity: bomItem.quantity, scrapFactor: bomItem.scrapFactor, sequenceNum: bomItem.sequenceNum]

service.description: Delete (expire) a BOM item by setting its thruDate.

service-call.name: update#mantle.product.ProductAssoc
service-call.in-map: [productId: bomItem.productId, toProductId: bomItem.toProductId, productAssocTypeEnumId: bomItem.productAssocTypeEnumId ?: 'PatMfgBom', fromDate: bomItem.fromDate, thruDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Get production work orders (WorkEffort with WepProductionRun purpose) for the current company.

iterate.script: bomItemsList.add([ toProductId: wep.productId, componentPseudoId: compProd?.pseudoId ?: '', componentName: compProd?.productName, quantity: requiredQty?.toString(), availableQuantity: totalAvailable?.toString(), unitCost: unitCost?.toString(), totalCost: itemTotalCost?.toString() ])
def costs = bomItemsList.findAll { it.totalCost != null }.collect { new BigDecimal(it.totalCost) } if (costs) woTotalCost = costs.sum().toString()

workOrders.add([ workEffortId: wo.workEffortId, pseudoId: wo.workEffortPseudoId, workEffortName: wo.workEffortName, statusId: wo.statusId, productId: wo.productId, productPseudoId: wo.productPseudoId, productName: wo.productName, estimatedQuantity: wo.estimatedQuantity?.toString(), estimatedStartDate: wo.estimatedStartDate?.toString(), estimatedCompletionDate: wo.estimatedCompletionDate?.toString(), actualStartDate: wo.actualStartDate?.toString(), actualCompletionDate: wo.actualCompletionDate?.toString(), totalCost: woTotalCost, routingId: wo.routingId, routingName: woRoutingName, bomItems: bomItemsList ])

service.description: Create a production work order (WorkEffort). Automatically populates WorkEffortProduct records from the product BOM.

service-call.name: mantle.work.ManufacturingServices.create#ProductionRun
service-call.in-map: [workEffortName: workOrder.workEffortName, produceProductId: resolvedProductId, produceEstimatedQuantity: workOrder.estimatedQuantity, estimatedStartDate: workOrder.estimatedStartDate, estimatedCompletionDate: workOrder.estimatedCompletionDate, ownerPartyId: companyPartyId, facilityId: facilityId ?: '_NA_']

service-call.name: update#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort
service-call.in-map: [workEffortId: workEffortId, workEffortPseudoId: seqNum, ownerPartyId: companyPartyId, routingId: workOrder.routingId]

service.description: Update a production work order status, quantity, or dates.

return.message: Work order ${workOrder.workEffortId} not found for company

service-call.name: update#mantle.work.effort.WorkEffort
service-call.in-map: [workEffortId: workOrder.workEffortId, workEffortName: workOrder.workEffortName, statusId: workOrder.statusId, estimatedQuantity: workOrder.estimatedQuantity, estimatedStartDate: workOrder.estimatedStartDate, estimatedCompletionDate: workOrder.estimatedCompletionDate, routingId: workOrder.routingId]

service-call.name: mantle.product.AssetServices.issue#AssetToWorkEffort
service-call.in-map: [assetId: compAsset.assetId, workEffortId: workOrder.workEffortId, quantity: issueQty, noOriginFacility: 'ignore']

service-call.name: mantle.product.AssetServices.receive#Asset
service-call.in-map: [productId: produceWep.productId, quantity: finishedGoodQty, acquireCost: finishedGoodUnitCost, facilityId: we.facilityId ?: '_NA_', ownerPartyId: companyPartyId, workEffortId: workOrder.workEffortId, statusId: 'AstAvailable', noProduceProduct: 'ignore']

service.description: Get production routings for the current company.

iterate.script: tasks.add([ routingTaskId: rt.routingTaskId, routingId: rt.routingId, taskName: rt.taskName, sequenceNum: rt.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: rt.estimatedWorkTime?.toString(), workCenterName: rt.workCenterName ])
routings.add([ routingId: ro.routingId, routingName: ro.routingName, description: ro.description, routingTasks: tasks ])

service.description: Get routing tasks for a specific routing.

iterate.script: routingTasks.add([ routingTaskId: rt.routingTaskId, routingId: rt.routingId, taskName: rt.taskName, sequenceNum: rt.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: rt.estimatedWorkTime?.toString(), workCenterName: rt.workCenterName ])

service.description: Create a production routing with optional tasks.

service-call.name: create#growerp.manufacturing.RoutingTask
service-call.in-map: [routingId: routingId, taskName: task.taskName, sequenceNum: task.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: task.estimatedWorkTime, workCenterName: task.workCenterName]

service.description: Delete a production routing and all its tasks.

service-call.name: create#growerp.manufacturing.RoutingTask
service-call.in-map: [routingId: routingTask.routingId, taskName: routingTask.taskName, sequenceNum: routingTask.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: routingTask.estimatedWorkTime, workCenterName: routingTask.workCenterName]

set.from: [ routingTaskId: rt.routingTaskId, routingId: rt.routingId, taskName: rt.taskName, sequenceNum: rt.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: rt.estimatedWorkTime?.toString(), workCenterName: rt.workCenterName ]

service-call.name: update#growerp.manufacturing.RoutingTask
service-call.in-map: [routingTaskId: routingTask.routingTaskId, taskName: routingTask.taskName, sequenceNum: routingTask.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: routingTask.estimatedWorkTime, workCenterName: routingTask.workCenterName]

set.from: [ routingTaskId: rt.routingTaskId, routingId: rt.routingId, taskName: rt.taskName, sequenceNum: rt.sequenceNum, estimatedWorkTime: rt.estimatedWorkTime?.toString(), workCenterName: rt.workCenterName ]

service.description: Cancel a production work order (sets status to WeCancelled and undoes any issued/produced inventory).

return.message: Work order ${workOrder.workEffortId} not found for company
